title: Positive flow: Logging a mood entry
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the mood logging screen. | Enter a mood level using the slider. | Select a date using the date picker. | Select a time using the time picker. | Tap the checkmark (✓) button to save the mood entry.
expected_result: The mood entry should be saved successfully. | The date and time should reflect the selected values.

title: Negative flow: Invalid date selection
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the mood logging screen. | Select an invalid date using the date picker. | Select a time using the time picker. | Tap the checkmark (✓) button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating an invalid date selection.

title: Negative flow: Invalid time selection
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the mood logging screen. | Enter a mood level using the slider. | Select an invalid time using the time picker. | Tap the checkmark (✓) button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating an invalid time selection.

title: Negative flow: Empty mood level
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the mood logging screen. | Select a date using the date picker. | Select a time using the time picker. | Tap the checkmark (✓) button without entering a mood level.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that a mood level is required.

title: Negative flow: Empty date selection
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the mood logging screen. | Enter a mood level using the slider. | Select a time using the time picker. | Tap the checkmark (✓) button without selecting a date.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that a date is required.

title: Negative flow: Empty time selection
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the mood logging screen. | Enter a mood level using the slider. | Select a date using the date picker. | Tap the checkmark (✓) button without selecting a time.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that a time is required.

title: Negative flow: Invalid date format
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the mood logging screen. | Enter a mood level using the slider. | Select an invalid date format using the date picker. | Select a time using the time picker. | Tap the checkmark (✓) button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating an invalid date format.

title: Negative flow: Invalid time format
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the mood logging screen. | Enter a mood level using the slider. | Select a date using the date picker. | Select an invalid time format using the time picker. | Tap the checkmark (✓) button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating an invalid time format.
